table_description: The opportunity_unit table stores information about business opportunities, including their status, priority, and related identifiers. It appears to be used for tracking and analyzing sales opportunities.

columns.name: opportunity_id
columns.description: The opportunity_id column uniquely identifies records in the table, serving as a primary key to distinguish between different opportunities.

columns.name: rnk
columns.description: The rnk column contains a numerical ranking, potentially used for sorting or prioritizing opportunities based on their value or potential.

columns.name: priority
columns.description: The priority column stores a string indicating the priority level of an opportunity, which can be used for filtering or categorizing opportunities based on their urgency or importance.

columns.name: opportunity_name
columns.description: The opportunity_name column contains a string describing the name of the opportunity, providing a human-readable identifier for the opportunity.

columns.name: opportunity_status
columns.description: The opportunity_status column stores a string indicating the current status of the opportunity, such as pending, closed, or in progress, which can be used for tracking the opportunity's lifecycle.

columns.name: gsscore_iscancellationalert
columns.description: The gsscore_iscancellationalert column contains a boolean value indicating whether a cancellation alert has been triggered, which can be used to identify opportunities at risk of being cancelled.

columns.name: gsscore_proposaldelivered
columns.description: The gsscore_proposaldelivered column stores a boolean value indicating whether a proposal has been delivered, which can be used to track the progress of the sales process.

columns.name: actualclosedate
columns.description: The actualclosedate column contains a string representing the date when the opportunity was actually closed, which can be used for analyzing the opportunity's timeline and performance.

columns.name: quote_id
columns.description: The quote_id column uniquely identifies records in the table, serving as a primary key to distinguish between different quotes related to opportunities.

columns.name: gsscore_torderprimaryproduct
columns.description: The gsscore_torderprimaryproduct column stores a string describing the primary product related to the opportunity, which can be used for analyzing the types of products being sold or proposed.

columns.name: gsscore_businessstream
columns.description: The gsscore_businessstream column contains a string indicating the business stream or category associated with the opportunity, which can be used for categorizing and analyzing opportunities by business segment.

columns.name: gsscore_utmcampaign
columns.description: The gsscore_utmcampaign column stores a string representing the marketing campaign related to the opportunity, which can be used for tracking the effectiveness of different marketing campaigns.

columns.name: unit_erp_number
columns.description: The unit_erp_number column contains a string representing the ERP number of the unit, which can be used to reference or integrate with external enterprise resource planning systems.

columns.name: contract_erp_number
columns.description: The contract_erp_number column stores a string representing the ERP number of the contract, which can be used to reference or integrate with external enterprise resource planning systems, potentially referencing a specific contract or agreement.
